message:
feat(tutorial): add premium UX polish for desktop and mobile

Add Stripe-level premium polish to all 6 tutorial components:

TutorialProgress:
- Keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Home, End)
- Animated connection lines between steps
- Mobile: rubber-band swipe feedback, shimmer effect

TutorialCodeBlock:
- Line hover highlighting
- Dynamic scroll indicators
- Keyboard shortcut hint (Cmd/Ctrl+C)
- Mobile scroll hint

TutorialPathCard:
- 3D parallax tilt on mouse move
- Animated gradient border on hover
- Enhanced sparkle animation on recommended badge
- Status indicator glow ring

TutorialTip:
- Hover elevation effect
- Icon micro-animations (wiggle on pro variant)

TutorialStep:
- Floating header icon animation
- Stagger reveal for all sections
- Directional hover on navigation buttons

TutorialCheckpoint:
- Rich confetti (burst + rain + sparkles)
- Trophy icon with glow ring
- Animated background orbs
- Button shimmer effect on hover
- Stagger reveal for accomplishments
